acf.short_information: Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL), The Official Notification For The Recruitment Of Senior Executive Trainee SET Has Released. This Recruitment Is For 120 Positions. The Candidates Can Apply Until 31 March 2026 (Extended). Candidates Must Check The Complete Details For The BSNL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026. (Advt. No. BSNLCO-11/12(11)/1/2025-RECTT-CO-Part(1))

table_header.red: BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Online Form 2026 - Start
table_header.green: BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Examination 2026 : Short Details

acf.age_limit_title: BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Examination 2026 : Age Limits As On 07 March 2026

acf.important_dates:
Online Apply Start Date : 05 February 2026
Online Apply Last Date : 31 March 2026 (Extended)
Last Date For Fee Payment : 31 March 2026
Correction Date : 01 - 08 April 2026
Exam Date : Notify Later
Admit Card : Before Exam
Result Date : Will Be Updated Here Soon
Candidates are advised to confirm from the BSNL official website.
acf.right_column_details:
For General/ OBC/ EWS : ₹ 2500/-
For SC/ ST/ PH : ₹ 1250/-
Payment Mode (Online): You can make the payment using the following methods:
Debit Card
Credit Card
Internet Banking
IMPS
Cash Card / Mobile Wallet
acf.age_limit:
Minimum Age :  21 Years
Maximum Age : 30 Years - General, EWS, OBC (CL)
Maximum Age : 33 Years - OBC (NCL) 
Maximum Age : 35 - SC, ST 
BSNL provides age relaxation for the Senior Executive Trainee SET position as per their regulations.
acf.eligibility: Candidates must have a B.E. / B.Tech degree in Electronics & Telecommunication, Electronics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical, or Instrumentation Engineering with minimum 60% marks.
acf.how_to_steps:
Interested candidates who wish to apply for the BSNL post can submit their application online before 31 March 2026.
Use the click here link provided below under important link section to apply directly.
Alternatively, visit the official website of BSNL to complete the application process online.
Make sure to complete the application before the deadline 31 March 2026.
Note – छात्रो से ये अनुरोध किया जाता है की वो अपना फॉर्म भरने से पहले Official Notification को ध्यान से जरूर पढे उसके बाद ही अपना फॉर्म भरे । (Last Date, Age Limit, & Education Qualification)
acf.faq:
Question: When will the online application for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 Start?
Answer: The online application for this recruitment has started on 05 February 2026.
Question: What is the last date for online application for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Online Form 2026?
Answer: The last date for online application Form is 31 March 2026.
Question: What is the age limit for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026?
Answer: The age limit for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026 is as follows:
The Minimum age is 21 Years & The Maximum Age Is 30 Years as on 07 March 2026.
Question: What is the eligibility for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Vacancy 2026?
Answer: The eligibility for BSNL Senior Executive Trainee Bharti 2026 is as follows post wise.
Question: What is the official website for BSNL?
Answer: The official website for BSNL is https://bsnl.co.in/en
